criteria.method: Instagram web_profile_info API. Sources: (1) social links from Twitch GQL queries, (2) direct handle guesses from YouTube/Twitch creator names. LATAM filter: city/country in bio, email TLD .ar/.uy, Argentine/Uruguayan names and slang

filtered_creators.notes: Ignacio Agustín Grosso — CS2 streamer on Twitch (69K) and Kick. Also in Twitch list.
'gordo adicto al mate', 'boludeo', based in Olavarría (Buenos Aires province). CS2 YouTuber @SrAmilcar. with 87.5K subs.
Brandon — Argentine CS2 creator. Also YouTube @branuelcs (27.4K) and Twitch branuel (34K).
Lucho Forgione — forg1's Instagram. Bio: '@twitch / forg1 — Counter Strike — Creador de Contenido @auroragamingg — Bell Ville - Córdoba'. Also in Twitch list (251K).
Safiro — safiro01's Instagram. Twitch partner, safiro@doxen.com.ar (.ar domain). Also in Twitch list (174K).

excluded.reason: Below range — nearly no Instagram presence
Not the YouTuber Dareh (different person: David Rehnberg)

notes: LATAM CS2 Instagram scene is small. Most Argentine CS2 creators have stronger presence on Twitch/YouTube than Instagram. gordoreally_ (69K) is the largest LATAM CS2 Instagram account found. Note: branuelcs, luchoforg1, and safirovt_ appear across multiple platforms (cross-platform creators).
